Cell.Data: pacing reference; easy currently has no fixed wave timeout
fill these values manually for medium tuning
fill these values manually for hard tuning
Jolly is tuned separately; do not mirror low/nice/big/mega blindly.
Current app logic treats Jolly as a per-wave mixed profile, not a simple fifth type.
current live easy jolly Prizefly bonus
current live medium jolly Prizefly bonus
current live hard jolly Prizefly bonus
Runtime jolly wave mix normalized from low/nice/big/mega only.

Runtime jolly wave mix normalized from low/nice/big/mega only.
Runtime jolly wave mix normalized from low/nice/big/mega only.
edit all easy/all medium/all hard first
